steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $20$, so the answer is B, 20. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content: Simplify: $$f(8) = 60 - 40 = 20.$$ That is the correct answer.
